name: rtp-personal-skills
description: Ravi Teja Palanki's complete AI PM operating system. 75+ skills across thinking, judgment, craft, research, writing, presentations, design systems, and admin — including the orchestrator that deploys all skills as expert agents. Install once on any machine to absorb the full RTP skill library.

plugins.name: rtp-personal-skills
plugins.description: The complete RTP skill library: orchestrator + 55 AIPM skills (thinking-core, product-sense, ai-strategy, safety-trust, agent-design, eval-quality, craft) + 16 general-purpose skills (thinking, writing, branding, presentations, visualization, design-systems, research, admin, resume-builder).
